headline: 2 Industrials Stocks with Impressive Fundamentals and 1 We Question
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 5% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 1.3% return.
